textByHash.cd9855b4afcfc45383e4300ce15d70433a7b6c65: I thought that was all done for the month.
textByHash.7078aecccdcb9cfde00f6cd525680708d48f388c: You expect me to pay a tax for THESE windows. They're not windows, they are holes in the wall! Bah! How much do you want?
textByHash.c28db2f97012ad9aa499062501c8cea3107edb7b: What? Can't you count? I'm not paying my tax to someone who can't count.
textByHash.4917df870e90a085be7165094da965196eceb2fc: That's not right. I'm not paying you that much!
textByHash.752e7a079bce784be178a5412edba1384da25063: [sigh] It seems a lot of money for some windows.
textByHash.7edeb643d1cf7ab26271597b9ae9a8e9a552e181: I would say I'm happy to see you, but that would be a lie.
textByHash.8a38bfa6bc36e6ecfad29b44a8a8c61feaa9984a: Gah! What weak excuse for sucking his populace dry has the King come up with this time?
textByHash.4b00ef067ca61f5a1fa19c74bcece874f4454fe1: By all that is holy, this is a travesty!
textByHash.5c4edee27fdfc503136129ca0c68c51a0ba1b155: Oh, hello again. Want to buy some armour?
